characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. She has long, straight brown hair and expressive facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Black long-sleeved top and large silver over-ear headphones.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: कोई आपको ये नहीं बताता, but broken English की वजह से लोग आपको judge करते हैं। [No one tells you this, but people judge you because of broken English.]
Character A says: इसीलिए मैंने Supernova try किया। [That's why I tried Supernova.]
Character A says: ये एक कमाल का app है। [It's an amazing app.]
Character A says: इसका AI tutor आपको बोलते वक़्त real-time feedback देता है। [Its AI tutor gives you real-time feedback while you speak.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing the relatable fear of being judged for poor English at work or in public.
- Introduces Supernova as a practical, modern solution.
- Highlights the AI tutor's real-time feedback feature to build curiosity.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: कोई आपको ये नहीं बताता, but broken English की वजह से लोग आपको judge करते हैं। Supernova AI Tutor. Real-time feedback.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Schedule. [Schedule.]
Character A says: मेरा pronunciation थोड़ा ग़लत था। [My pronunciation was a bit wrong.]
Character A says: Schedule. [Schedule.]
Character A says: Perfect! [Perfect!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's interactive pronunciation and speaking feature.
- Normalizes making mistakes and shows how easy it is to correct them.
- Provides a quick, satisfying payoff that proves the app works.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Schedule. मेरा pronunciation थोड़ा ग़लत था। Schedule. Perfect!

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: ये आपके level के हिसाब से daily lessons plan करता है। [It plans daily lessons according to your level.]
Character A says: आप Hindi के through आसानी से English सीख सकते हैं। [You can easily learn English through Hindi.]
Character A says: और सबसे अच्छी बात, आप real-world situations जैसे interviews और office meetings की practice कर सकते हैं। [And the best part, you can practice real-world situations like interviews and office meetings.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Explains the personalized daily lessons and the comfort of a Hindi-medium approach.
- Highlights the practical benefit of practicing real-world scenarios like interviews.
- Reassures the user of the app's direct utility for career and confidence growth.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Daily lessons based on your level. Learn English through Hindi. Practice real-world situations: Interviews, Office Meetings.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a strong call-to-action to download the app.
- Reinforces the core value proposition: speaking English confidently.
- Removes competitor's specific free trial claims to align with Supernova's premium positioning.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Supernova. Download the app today. Speak English Confidently.
